title: Streaming text generation
summary: Stream tokens as they arrive. The first chunk timestamp is reported as TTFT; usage_metadata is captured from the final chunk.
notes: Streaming does not change billing — the response is the same total tokens, just delivered incrementally.
TTFT (time to first token) typically dominates the perceived UX for short responses; tokens/sec dominates for long ones.
usage_metadata only arrives on the final chunk in the unified SDK — accumulate text across chunks, read usage at the end.
